The neighborhood is Applebee's

Closest Applebee's: 11 minutes by jet ski, 14 by Harley. We've timed it.

🇺🇸

Maximum patriotism guaranteed

4 (four) full-size flags. 1 (one) flag pole that lights up. Bald eagle on retainer.

🛥️

Three jet skis included

One named Liberty. One named Freedom. One named Cheryl (we don't talk about Cheryl).

🏍️

The Harley Bay™

Fits 6 bikes. Comes with one (1) ceremonial leather vest you must wear at check-in.

Welcome to the Applebee's Lodge of Lake Tahoe — a 6,400 sq ft monument to riblets, freedom, and the unshakable belief that a Bahama Mama is, in fact, a personality.

This isn't just a lake house. This is where legends are made, group chats are formed, and at least one person each weekend says "we should do this every year" while half-crying on the dock.

The 2025 Fourth of July weekend — the one where Grace Bonafede was wearing the Veuve Clicquot hat and delivered The Quote — became the stuff of group-chat legend, and we've designed the entire 2026 experience around recreating that exact night, except this time everyone gets along about dinner plans.

Whatever, go to Applebee's, I don't even care.
— Grace Bonafede, Tahoe, July 4th, 2025 (the moment that started a movement)

Yes — we DO have a shrine. Yes — there IS a plaque. Yes — every meal here begins with a toast to that exact sentence, and every Uber ride to a chain restaurant ends with it.

Sleeps 14. Sleeps 14 well. Sleeps 14 like they earned it.

What this place offers

🍎 Direct Applebee's Wi-Fi pipeline
🏞️ 180° unobstructed Lake Tahoe view
🎆 4th of July fireworks visible from hot tub
🛥️ Private dock, 3 jet skis, 1 pontoon
⚓ Yacht access — South Lake Tahoe → Glen Cove run
🏍️ Garage fits 6 motorcycles
🍔 Replica Applebee's bar in basement
🇺🇸 4 American flags (always lit)
🎤 Karaoke room (weighted toward Toby Keith)
🔥 Fire pit with seating for 14
🍾 Veuve Clicquot mini-fridge in primary suite
🦅 Bald eagle viewing scope on deck
🧊 Margarita machine (always on)
⛈️ Hailstorm survivor badge (class of '25)

Things to do (if you don't even care)

★ FROM THE LODGE ★ ON THE LAKE ★ AT THE APPLEBEE'S ★

🛥️ Jet Ski Liberty Run

Race three friends across the cove. Loser buys the next round at — you guessed it.

🏍️ Tahoe Loop Bike Tour

72 miles around the lake. Lunch stop is non-negotiable. We will be eatin' good.

🎆 Tahoe 4th Fireworks

Best view from the upper dock. Bring sparklers. Bring tissues. Bring your group chat.

Six Harleys.
One Lake.
Zero apologies.

The Harley Bay™ is heated, alarmed, and stocked with one ceremonial vest per guest. Every morning starts with engines. Every night ends with riblets. This is not a phase. This is a lifestyle.

6
Harleys included
3
Jet skis
∞
Riblets nearby
★ The Legend of Glen Cove ★ July 4th, 2025 ★ South Lake → Millionaire's Cove ★

We Took a Yacht to a Millionaire's Mansion.
Then It Hailed. We Stayed Outside.

★ THE ESTATE — WHERE THE BOAT DOCKED — GLEN COVE
★ THE KITCHEN — GRILL & BAR — WHERE THE MAGIC HAPPENS

The 2025 Yacht Run: We departed South Lake Tahoe on the water, pointed the bow toward Glen Cove, and docked at a lakefront estate that makes the Applebee's Lodge look like a Motel 6. Body paint was applied. Flags were raised. Cold ones were cracked. Someone pointed at a mountain and said "freedom." Nobody disagreed.

Mid-afternoon, the sky turned green. A hailstorm of near-biblical proportion opened up over the lawn. Every rational person ran for cover. Every person at this party did not. Patriots don't.

Boat route: South Lake Tahoe Marina → Glen Cove → millionaire's private dock → history.

☁️ HAILSTORM OF '25 — CERTIFIED TAHOE HARDENED ☁️
